---
title: "Personalized Conference Agenda"
output: html_document
params:
  my_agenda: NA
---
```{r format,echo=FALSE}
df <- params$my_agenda %>%
  select(date,start_time,end_time,session,title,speaker,room,org)

df_list <- split(df,df$date)

table_list <- lapply(df_list,function(sub_df){
    date <- lubridate::as_date(unique(sub_df$date))
    sub_df2 <- sub_df %>%
      select(start_time,end_time,session,title,speaker,room,org)
    datatable(sub_df2,
              options=list(pageLenth=5,  
                           initComplete = JS(
                      "function(settings, json) {",
                      "$(this.api().table().header()).css({'background-color': '#000', 'color': '#fff', 'font-size': '14px'});",
                      "}"
                    )),
              caption = paste("Agenda for",format(date,"%B %d, %Y")))
  })

tagList(table_list)
```
